---
title: "Simulation notes clustered binary final simulation stuff"
author: "Paolo Colussi"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r}
rm(list = ls())
source("functions.R")  # GMERT fitting and prediction functions and libraries
```

## First genral simulation

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# sim_data_gmert: simulate clustered binary data for GMERT models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
sim_data1 <- function(G = 50,          # number of clusters
                           n_i = 40,        # observations per cluster
                           beta0 = 0.5,     # fixed intercept
                           beta1 = 1.2,     # fixed effect for x1
                           beta2 = -0.8,    # fixed effect for x2
                           beta3 = 0.6,     # fixed effect for x3
                           sigma_b0 = 0.8,  # SD of random intercept
                           sigma_b1 = 0.5,  # SD of random slope for x1
                           rho = 0.2,       # correlation between b0 and b1
                           seed = 123) {    # random seed for reproducibility

  set.seed(seed)

  # covariance matrix of random effects (b0_i, b1_i)
  D <- matrix(c(sigma_b0^2, rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1,
                rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1, sigma_b1^2), 2, 2)

  # generate random effects for G clusters
  b <- MASS::mvrnorm(G, mu = c(0, 0), Sigma = D)

  # cluster identifiers
  id <- rep(1:G, each = n_i)

  # generate covariates: x1 (uniform), x2 (normal), x3 (binary)
  x1 <- runif(G * n_i, -2, 2)
  x2 <- rnorm(G * n_i, 0, 1)
  x3 <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, 0.5)

  # linear predictor: fixed part + random part (b0_i + b1_i * x1)
  eta <- numeric(G * n_i)
  for (g in seq_len(G)) {
    idx <- which(id == g)
    eta[idx] <- beta0 + beta1 * x1[idx] + beta2 * x2[idx] + beta3 * x3[idx] +
                b[g, 1] + b[g, 2] * x1[idx]
  }

  # convert to probabilities via logistic link
  p <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta))

  # binary outcome drawn from Bernoulli(p)
  y <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, p)

  # return as data.frame ready for model fitting
  data.frame(
    id = factor(id),
    y = y,
    x1 = x1,
    x2 = x2,
    x3 = x3
  )
}

# ================================================================
# 10-fold cluster-balanced CV in PARALLEL, GMERT vs GLMM vs others
# ================================================================

set.seed(42 )

# --- 0) Simulate one dataset ------------------------------------------------------
df1 <- sim_data1(G = 30, n_i = 60)
performance::icc(
  glmer(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + (1 + x1 | id), data = df1, family = binomial())
)  # check clustering strength

# --- 1) Build K cluster-aware folds ----------------------------------------------
K <- 10
folds <- vector("list", K); for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- integer(0)

for (g in unique(df1$id)) {
  idx_g <- which(df1$id == g)
  idx_g <- sample(idx_g)                                # shuffle within cluster
  split_g <- split(idx_g, cut(seq_along(idx_g), K, labels = FALSE))
  for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- c(folds[[k]], split_g[[k]])
}

# ================================================================
# PARALLEL SECTION
# ================================================================

# pick number of workers (leave one core free when possible)
n_workers <- max(1L, min(K, detectCores() - 1L))
cl <- makeCluster(n_workers, type = "PSOCK")

# make RNG reproducible across workers
clusterSetRNGStream(cl, iseed = 42)

df <- df1
# load packages and export needed objects/functions to workers
clusterEvalQ(cl, { library(rpart); library(MASS);library(lme4); library(ranger)})
clusterExport(
  cl,
  varlist = c("df", "folds", "fit_gmert_small", "predict_gmert", "f1_fun", "K","Ajnv_fun",
                "b_fun_small","D_fun_small","sigma_fun_small","gll_fun", 
              "fit_gmerf_small","predict_gmerf"),
  envir = environment()
)

# --- Run folds in parallel -----------------------------------------------------
cv_results_par1 <- parLapply(cl, seq_len(K), function(k) {
  # define train/test indices
  test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
  train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), test_idx)
  df_train  <- df[train_idx, ]
  df_test   <- df[test_idx, ]

  # GMERT: fit and predict
  fit_gmert_k <- fit_gmert_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 100, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmert  <- predict_gmert(fit_gmert_k, df_test)

  # GLMM: fit and predict (same random-effects structure)
  fit_glmm_k <- glmer(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + (1 + x1 | id),
    data = df_train,
    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
    control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")
  )
  p_glmm     <- as.numeric(predict(fit_glmm_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  yhat_glmm  <- as.integer(p_glmm >= 0.5)
  
  #GEMERF: fit and predict
  fit_gmerf_k <- fit_gmerf_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 100, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmerf  <- predict_gmerf(fit_gmerf_k, df_test)

  # Logit regression: fit and predict
  logit_fit_k <- glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = df_train, family = binomial())
  p_logit     <- as.numeric(predict(logit_fit_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  pred_logit  <- as.integer(p_logit >= 0.5)
  
  # Classification tree: fit and predict
  df_train_ct <- df_train; df_train_ct$y <- factor(df_train_ct$y, levels = c(0,1))
  df_test_ct  <- df_test;  df_test_ct$y  <- factor(df_test_ct$y,  levels = c(0,1))
  ctree_fit_k <- rpart::rpart(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train_ct,
    method = "class",
    control = rpart::rpart.control(cp = 0.0, minsplit = 20, minbucket = 7, maxdepth = 5)
  )
  pred_ct_class_k <- predict(ctree_fit_k, newdata = df_test_ct, type = "class") # factor("0"/"1")
  pred_ctree <- as.integer(as.character(pred_ct_class_k))
  
  # Random Forest: fit and predict
  rf_fit_k <- ranger::ranger(
    formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 2,
    min.node.size = 5,
    classification = TRUE,
    probability = FALSE,
    seed = 42
  )
  pred_rf <- predict(rf_fit_k, data = df_test)$predictions  # numeric 0/1
  pred_rf <- as.integer(pred_rf)
  
  # ----- (c) Metrics on the test portion of this fold
  # Confusion matrices
  cm_g <- table(predicted = yhat_gmert, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_l <- table(predicted = yhat_glmm, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_logit <- table(predicted = pred_logit, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_ctree <- table(predicted = pred_ctree, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_rf <- table(predicted = pred_rf, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_gmerf <- table(predicted = yhat_gmerf, actual = df_test$y)

  # Accuracy
  acc_g <- mean(yhat_gmert == df_test$y)
  acc_l <- mean(yhat_glmm == df_test$y)
  acc_logit <- mean(pred_logit == df_test$y)
  acc_ctree <- mean(pred_ctree == df_test$y)
  acc_rf <- mean(pred_rf == df_test$y)
  acc_gmerf <- mean(yhat_gmerf == df_test$y)

  # F1 score (magiority class)
  f1_mag_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = TRUE)
  
  #F1 score (minority class)
  f1_min_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = FALSE)
  
  #Bias
  bias_g <- sum(yhat_gmert)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_l <- sum(yhat_glmm)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_logit <- sum(pred_logit)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_ctree <- sum(pred_ctree)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_rf <- sum(pred_rf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_gmerf <- sum(yhat_gmerf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  
  
  # return full fold bundle
  list(
    fold_id   = k,
    train_idx = train_idx,
    test_idx  = test_idx,
    gmert_fit = fit_gmert_k,
    gmerf_fit = fit_gmerf_k,
    glmm_fit  = fit_glmm_k,
    logit_fit = logit_fit_k,
    ctree_fit = ctree_fit_k,
    rf_fit    = rf_fit_k,
    metrics = list(
      acc_gmert = acc_g, f1_mag_gmert = f1_mag_g,
      f1_min_gmert = f1_min_g, bias_gmert = bias_g,
      acc_glmm  = acc_l,  f1_mag_glmm = f1_mag_l,
      f1_min_glmm = f1_min_l, bias_glmm = bias_l,
      acc_logit = acc_logit, f1_mag_logit = f1_mag_logit,
      f1_min_logit = f1_min_logit, bias_logit = bias_logit,
      acc_ctree = acc_ctree, f1_mag_ctree = f1_mag_ctree,
      f1_min_ctree = f1_min_ctree, bias_ctree = bias_ctree,
      acc_rf    = acc_rf,    f1_mag_rf    = f1_mag_rf,
      f1_min_rf    = f1_min_rf, bias_rf = bias_rf,
      acc_gmerf = acc_gmerf, f1_mag_gmerf = f1_mag_gmerf,
      f1_min_gmerf = f1_min_gmerf, bias_gmerf = bias_gmerf
    ),
    confusion = list(
      gmert = cm_g,
      gmerf = cm_gmerf,
      glmm  = cm_l,
      logit = cm_logit,
      ctree = cm_ctree,
      rf    = cm_rf
    ), 
    df_train = df_train,
    df_test = df_test
  )
})

# ---  Aggregate metrics across folds -------------------------------------------
metrics_df_par1 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par1, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    fold = x$fold_id,
    acc_gmert = x$metrics$acc_gmert,
    f1_mag_gmert  = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert,
    f1_min_gmert = x$metrics$f1_min_gmert,
    bias_gmert = x$metrics$bias_gmert,
    acc_glmm  = x$metrics$acc_glmm,
    f1_mag_glmm = x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm,
    f1_min_glmm = x$metrics$f1_min_glmm,
    bias_glmm = x$metrics$bias_glmm,
    acc_logit = x$metrics$acc_logit,
    f1_mag_logit = x$metrics$f1_mag_logit,
    f1_min_logit = x$metrics$f1_min_logit,
    bias_logit = x$metrics$bias_logit,
    acc_ctree = x$metrics$acc_ctree,
    f1_mag_ctree = x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree,
    f1_min_ctree = x$metrics$f1_min_ctree,
    bias_ctree = x$metrics$bias_ctree,
    acc_rf    = x$metrics$acc_rf,
    f1_mag_rf = x$metrics$f1_mag_rf,
    f1_min_rf = x$metrics$f1_min_rf,
    bias_rf = x$metrics$bias_rf,
    acc_gmerf = x$metrics$acc_gmerf,
    f1_mag_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmerf,
    f1_min_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_min_gmerf,
    bias_gmerf = x$metrics$bias_gmerf
  )
}))

metrics_df_par <- metrics_df_par1

cv_summary_par1 <- data.frame(
  model   = c("GMERT","GLMM", "Logit", "CART", "RF", "GMERF"),
  acc_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  acc_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_min_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  f1_min_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  bias_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf)),
  bias_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf))
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-fold summary table from cv_results
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

fold_table_par1 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par1, function(x) {
  # guard in case converged_in is missing/NULL
  inner_vec <- x$gmert_fit$converged_in
  inner_pct <- if (length(inner_vec)) mean(inner_vec) * 100 else NA_real_

  data.frame(
    Fold              = x$fold_id,
    Outer_Converged   = isTRUE(x$gmert_fit$converged_out),
    Inner_Conv_Percent= round(inner_pct, 1),
    F1_GMERT          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert, 4),
    F1_GLMM           = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm, 4),
    logit_F1         = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_logit, 4),
    CART_F1          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree, 4),
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}))

# sort by fold, just in case
fold_table <- fold_table_par1[order(fold_table_par1$Fold), ]

# pretty print
knitr::kable(
  fold_table,
  align = c("c","c","r","r","r"),
  rounding = 4,
  caption = "Per-fold convergence status and F1 scores (GMERT, GLMM, Logit, CART, RF, GMERF)"
)

cv_summary_par1

```


## Second simulation non linear covariate effect

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# sim_data_gmert: simulate clustered binary data for GMERT models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
sim_data2 <- function(G = 50,          # number of clusters
                           n_i = 40,        # observations per cluster
                           beta0 = 0.5,     # fixed intercept
                           beta1 = 1.2,     # fixed effect for x1
                           beta2 = -1,    # fixed effect for x2
                           beta3 = 0.6,     # fixed effect for x3
                           sigma_b0 = 0.8,  # SD of random intercept
                           sigma_b1 = 0.5,  # SD of random slope for x1
                           rho = 0.2,       # correlation between b0 and b1
                           seed = 123) {    # random seed for reproducibility

  set.seed(seed)

  # covariance matrix of random effects (b0_i, b1_i)
  D <- matrix(c(sigma_b0^2, rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1,
                rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1, sigma_b1^2), 2, 2)

  # generate random effects for G clusters
  b <- MASS::mvrnorm(G, mu = c(0, 0), Sigma = D)

  # cluster identifiers
  id <- rep(1:G, each = n_i)

  # generate covariates: x1 (uniform), x2 (normal), x3 (binary)
  x1 <- runif(G * n_i, -2, 2)
  x2 <- rnorm(G * n_i, 5, 1)
  x3 <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, 0.5)

  # linear predictor: fixed part + random part (b0_i + b1_i * x1)
  eta <- numeric(G * n_i)
  for (g in seq_len(G)) {
    idx <- which(id == g)
    eta[idx] <- beta0 + beta1 * x1[idx] + beta2 * log(x2[idx]) + beta3 * x3[idx] +
                b[g, 1] + b[g, 2] * x1[idx]
  }

  # convert to probabilities via logistic link
  p <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta))

  # binary outcome drawn from Bernoulli(p)
  y <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, p)

  # return as data.frame ready for model fitting
  data.frame(
    id = factor(id),
    y = y,
    x1 = x1,
    x2 = x2,
    x3 = x3,
    eta = eta
  )
}


# ================================================================
# 10-fold cluster-balanced CV in PARALLEL: GMERT vs GLMM
# ================================================================

set.seed(42 )

# --- 0) Simulate one dataset ------------------------------------------------------
df2 <- sim_data2(G = 30, n_i = 60) 


# --- 1) Build K cluster-aware folds ----------------------------------------------
K <- 10
folds <- vector("list", K); for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- integer(0)

for (g in unique(df2$id)) {
  idx_g <- which(df2$id == g)
  idx_g <- sample(idx_g)                                # shuffle within cluster
  split_g <- split(idx_g, cut(seq_along(idx_g), K, labels = FALSE))
  for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- c(folds[[k]], split_g[[k]])
}

# ================================================================
# PARALLEL SECTION
# ================================================================

# pick number of workers (leave one core free when possible)
n_workers <- max(1L, min(K, detectCores() - 1L))
cl <- makeCluster(n_workers, type = "PSOCK")

# make RNG reproducible across workers
clusterSetRNGStream(cl, iseed = 42)

df <- df2
# load packages and export needed objects/functions to workers
clusterEvalQ(cl, { library(rpart); library(MASS);library(lme4); library(ranger)})
clusterExport(
  cl,
  varlist = c("df", "folds", "fit_gmert_small", "predict_gmert", "f1_fun", "K","Ajnv_fun",
                "b_fun_small","D_fun_small","sigma_fun_small","gll_fun", 
              "fit_gmerf_small","predict_gmerf"),
  envir = environment()
)

# --- Run folds in parallel -----------------------------------------------------
cv_results_par2 <- parLapply(cl, seq_len(K), function(k) {
  # define train/test indices
  test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
  train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), test_idx)
  df_train  <- df[train_idx, ]
  df_test   <- df[test_idx, ]

  # GMERT: fit and predict
  fit_gmert_k <- fit_gmert_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 100 , tol = 1e-2)
  yhat_gmert  <- predict_gmert(fit_gmert_k, df_test)

  # GLMM: fit and predict (same random-effects structure)
  fit_glmm_k <- glmer(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + (1 + x1 | id),
    data = df_train,
    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
    control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")
  )
  p_glmm     <- as.numeric(predict(fit_glmm_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  yhat_glmm  <- as.integer(p_glmm >= 0.5)
  
  #GEMERF: fit and predict
  fit_gmerf_k <- fit_gmerf_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 100, tol = 1e-2)
  yhat_gmerf  <- predict_gmerf(fit_gmerf_k, df_test)

  # Logit regression: fit and predict
  logit_fit_k <- glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = df_train, family = binomial())
  p_logit     <- as.numeric(predict(logit_fit_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  pred_logit  <- as.integer(p_logit >= 0.5)
  
  # Classification tree: fit and predict
  df_train_ct <- df_train; df_train_ct$y <- factor(df_train_ct$y, levels = c(0,1))
  df_test_ct  <- df_test;  df_test_ct$y  <- factor(df_test_ct$y,  levels = c(0,1))
  ctree_fit_k <- rpart::rpart(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train_ct,
    method = "class",
    control = rpart::rpart.control(cp = 0.0, minsplit = 20, minbucket = 7, maxdepth = 5)
  )
  pred_ct_class_k <- predict(ctree_fit_k, newdata = df_test_ct, type = "class") # factor("0"/"1")
  pred_ctree <- as.integer(as.character(pred_ct_class_k))
  
  # Random Forest: fit and predict
  rf_fit_k <- ranger::ranger(
    formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 2,
    min.node.size = 5,
    classification = TRUE,
    probability = FALSE,
    seed = 42
  )
  pred_rf <- predict(rf_fit_k, data = df_test)$predictions  # numeric 0/1
  pred_rf <- as.integer(pred_rf)
  
  # ----- (c) Metrics on the test portion of this fold
  # Confusion matrices
  cm_g <- table(predicted = yhat_gmert, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_l <- table(predicted = yhat_glmm, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_logit <- table(predicted = pred_logit, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_ctree <- table(predicted = pred_ctree, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_rf <- table(predicted = pred_rf, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_gmerf <- table(predicted = yhat_gmerf, actual = df_test$y)

  # Accuracy
  acc_g <- mean(yhat_gmert == df_test$y)
  acc_l <- mean(yhat_glmm == df_test$y)
  acc_logit <- mean(pred_logit == df_test$y)
  acc_ctree <- mean(pred_ctree == df_test$y)
  acc_rf <- mean(pred_rf == df_test$y)
  acc_gmerf <- mean(yhat_gmerf == df_test$y)

  # F1 score (magiority class)
  f1_mag_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = TRUE)
  
  #F1 score (minority class)
  f1_min_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = FALSE)
  
  #Bias
  bias_g <- sum(yhat_gmert)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_l <- sum(yhat_glmm)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_logit <- sum(pred_logit)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_ctree <- sum(pred_ctree)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_rf <- sum(pred_rf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_gmerf <- sum(yhat_gmerf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  
  
  # return full fold bundle
  list(
    fold_id   = k,
    train_idx = train_idx,
    test_idx  = test_idx,
    gmert_fit = fit_gmert_k,
    gmerf_fit = fit_gmerf_k,
    glmm_fit  = fit_glmm_k,
    logit_fit = logit_fit_k,
    ctree_fit = ctree_fit_k,
    rf_fit    = rf_fit_k,
    metrics = list(
      acc_gmert = acc_g, f1_mag_gmert = f1_mag_g,
      f1_min_gmert = f1_min_g, bias_gmert = bias_g,
      acc_glmm  = acc_l,  f1_mag_glmm = f1_mag_l,
      f1_min_glmm = f1_min_l, bias_glmm = bias_l,
      acc_logit = acc_logit, f1_mag_logit = f1_mag_logit,
      f1_min_logit = f1_min_logit, bias_logit = bias_logit,
      acc_ctree = acc_ctree, f1_mag_ctree = f1_mag_ctree,
      f1_min_ctree = f1_min_ctree, bias_ctree = bias_ctree,
      acc_rf    = acc_rf,    f1_mag_rf    = f1_mag_rf,
      f1_min_rf    = f1_min_rf, bias_rf = bias_rf,
      acc_gmerf = acc_gmerf, f1_mag_gmerf = f1_mag_gmerf,
      f1_min_gmerf = f1_min_gmerf, bias_gmerf = bias_gmerf
    ),
    confusion = list(
      gmert = cm_g,
      gmerf = cm_gmerf,
      glmm  = cm_l,
      logit = cm_logit,
      ctree = cm_ctree,
      rf    = cm_rf
    ), 
    df_train = df_train,
    df_test = df_test
  )
})

# ---  Aggregate metrics across folds -------------------------------------------
metrics_df_par2 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par2, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    fold = x$fold_id,
    acc_gmert = x$metrics$acc_gmert,
    f1_mag_gmert  = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert,
    f1_min_gmert = x$metrics$f1_min_gmert,
    bias_gmert = x$metrics$bias_gmert,
    acc_glmm  = x$metrics$acc_glmm,
    f1_mag_glmm = x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm,
    f1_min_glmm = x$metrics$f1_min_glmm,
    bias_glmm = x$metrics$bias_glmm,
    acc_logit = x$metrics$acc_logit,
    f1_mag_logit = x$metrics$f1_mag_logit,
    f1_min_logit = x$metrics$f1_min_logit,
    bias_logit = x$metrics$bias_logit,
    acc_ctree = x$metrics$acc_ctree,
    f1_mag_ctree = x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree,
    f1_min_ctree = x$metrics$f1_min_ctree,
    bias_ctree = x$metrics$bias_ctree,
    acc_rf    = x$metrics$acc_rf,
    f1_mag_rf = x$metrics$f1_mag_rf,
    f1_min_rf = x$metrics$f1_min_rf,
    bias_rf = x$metrics$bias_rf,
    acc_gmerf = x$metrics$acc_gmerf,
    f1_mag_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmerf,
    f1_min_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_min_gmerf,
    bias_gmerf = x$metrics$bias_gmerf)
}))

metrics_df_par <- metrics_df_par2

cv_summary_par2 <- data.frame(
  model   = c("GMERT","GLMM", "Logit", "CART", "RF", "GMERF"),
  acc_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  acc_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_min_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  f1_min_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  bias_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf)),
  bias_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf))
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-fold summary table from cv_results
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

fold_table_par2 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par2, function(x) {
  # guard in case converged_in is missing/NULL
  inner_vec <- x$gmert_fit$converged_in
  inner_pct <- if (length(inner_vec)) mean(inner_vec) * 100 else NA_real_

  data.frame(
    Fold              = x$fold_id,
    Outer_Converged   = isTRUE(x$gmert_fit$converged_out),
    Inner_Conv_Percent= round(inner_pct, 1),
    F1_GMERT          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert, 4),
    F1_GLMM           = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm, 4),
    logit_F1         = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_logit, 4),
    CART_F1          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree, 4),
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}))

# sort by fold, just in case
fold_table <- fold_table_par2[order(fold_table_par2$Fold), ]

# pretty print
knitr::kable(
  fold_table,
  align = c("c","c","r","r","r"),
  rounding = 4,
  caption = "Per-fold convergence status and F1 scores (GMERT, GLMM, Logit, CART, RF, GMERF)"
)

cv_summary_par2

```


## Third simulation interaction between covariates

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# sim_data_gmert: simulate clustered binary data for GMERT models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
sim_data3 <- function(G = 50,          # number of clusters
                           n_i = 40,        # observations per cluster
                           beta0 = 0.5,     # fixed intercept
                           beta1 = 1.2,     # fixed effect for x1
                           beta2 = -0.8,    # fixed effect for x2
                           beta3 = 0.6,     # fixed effect for x3
                           sigma_b0 = 0.8,  # SD of random intercept
                           sigma_b1 = 0.5,  # SD of random slope for x1
                           rho = 0.2,       # correlation between b0 and b1
                           seed = 123) {    # random seed for reproducibility

  set.seed(seed)

  # covariance matrix of random effects (b0_i, b1_i)
  D <- matrix(c(sigma_b0^2, rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1,
                rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1, sigma_b1^2), 2, 2)

  # generate random effects for G clusters
  b <- MASS::mvrnorm(G, mu = c(0, 0), Sigma = D)

  # cluster identifiers
  id <- rep(1:G, each = n_i)

  # generate covariates: x1 (uniform), x2 (normal), x3 (binary)
  x1 <- runif(G * n_i, -2, 2)
  x2 <- rnorm(G * n_i, 5, 1)
  x3 <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, 0.5)
  x4 <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, 0.5)

  # linear predictor: fixed part + random part (b0_i + b1_i * x1)
  eta <- numeric(G * n_i)
  for (g in seq_len(G)) {
    idx <- which(id == g)
    eta[idx] <- beta0 + beta1 * x1[idx] + beta2 * x2[idx]*x4[idx] + beta3 * x3[idx] +
                b[g, 1] + b[g, 2] * x1[idx]
  }

  # convert to probabilities via logistic link
  p <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta))

  # binary outcome drawn from Bernoulli(p)
  y <- rbinom(G * n_i, 1, p)

  # return as data.frame ready for model fitting
  data.frame(
    id = factor(id),
    y = y,
    x1 = x1,
    x2 = x2,
    x3 = x3,
    x4 = x4
  )
}


# ================================================================
# 10-fold cluster-balanced CV in PARALLEL: GMERT vs GLMM
# ================================================================

set.seed(42 )

# --- 0) Simulate one dataset ------------------------------------------------------
df3 <- sim_data3(G = 30, n_i = 60) 

# --- 1) Build K cluster-aware folds ----------------------------------------------
K <- 10
folds <- vector("list", K); for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- integer(0)

for (g in unique(df3$id)) {
  idx_g <- which(df3$id == g)
  idx_g <- sample(idx_g)                                # shuffle within cluster
  split_g <- split(idx_g, cut(seq_along(idx_g), K, labels = FALSE))
  for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- c(folds[[k]], split_g[[k]])
}

# ================================================================
# PARALLEL SECTION
# ================================================================

# pick number of workers (leave one core free when possible)
n_workers <- max(1L, min(K, detectCores() - 1L))
cl <- makeCluster(n_workers, type = "PSOCK")

# make RNG reproducible across workers
clusterSetRNGStream(cl, iseed = 42)

df <- df3
# load packages and export needed objects/functions to workers
clusterEvalQ(cl, { library(rpart); library(MASS);library(lme4); library(ranger)})
clusterExport(
  cl,
  varlist = c("df", "folds", "fit_gmert_small", "predict_gmert", "f1_fun", "K","Ajnv_fun",
                "b_fun_small","D_fun_small","sigma_fun_small","gll_fun", 
              "fit_gmerf_small","predict_gmerf"),
  envir = environment()
)

# --- Run folds in parallel -----------------------------------------------------
cv_results_par3 <- parLapply(cl, seq_len(K), function(k) {
  # define train/test indices
  test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
  train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), test_idx)
  df_train  <- df[train_idx, ]
  df_test   <- df[test_idx, ]

  # GMERT: fit and predict
  fit_gmert_k <- fit_gmert_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 50, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmert  <- predict_gmert(fit_gmert_k, df_test)

  # GLMM: fit and predict (same random-effects structure)
  fit_glmm_k <- glmer(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x4 + (1 + x1 | id),
    data = df_train,
    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
    control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")
  )
  p_glmm     <- as.numeric(predict(fit_glmm_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  yhat_glmm  <- as.integer(p_glmm >= 0.5)
  
  #GEMERF: fit and predict
  fit_gmerf_k <- fit_gmerf_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 50, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmerf  <- predict_gmerf(fit_gmerf_k, df_test)

  # Logit regression: fit and predict
  logit_fit_k <- glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x4, data = df_train, family = binomial())
  p_logit     <- as.numeric(predict(logit_fit_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  pred_logit  <- as.integer(p_logit >= 0.5)
  
  # Classification tree: fit and predict
  df_train_ct <- df_train; df_train_ct$y <- factor(df_train_ct$y, levels = c(0,1))
  df_test_ct  <- df_test;  df_test_ct$y  <- factor(df_test_ct$y,  levels = c(0,1))
  ctree_fit_k <- rpart::rpart(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train_ct,
    method = "class",
    control = rpart::rpart.control(cp = 0.0, minsplit = 20, minbucket = 7, maxdepth = 5)
  )
  pred_ct_class_k <- predict(ctree_fit_k, newdata = df_test_ct, type = "class") # factor("0"/"1")
  pred_ctree <- as.integer(as.character(pred_ct_class_k))
  
  # Random Forest: fit and predict
  rf_fit_k <- ranger::ranger(
    formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 2,
    min.node.size = 5,
    classification = TRUE,
    probability = FALSE,
    seed = 42
  )
  pred_rf <- predict(rf_fit_k, data = df_test)$predictions  # numeric 0/1
  pred_rf <- as.integer(pred_rf)
  
  # ----- (c) Metrics on the test portion of this fold
  # Confusion matrices
  cm_g <- table(predicted = yhat_gmert, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_l <- table(predicted = yhat_glmm, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_logit <- table(predicted = pred_logit, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_ctree <- table(predicted = pred_ctree, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_rf <- table(predicted = pred_rf, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_gmerf <- table(predicted = yhat_gmerf, actual = df_test$y)

  # Accuracy
  acc_g <- mean(yhat_gmert == df_test$y)
  acc_l <- mean(yhat_glmm == df_test$y)
  acc_logit <- mean(pred_logit == df_test$y)
  acc_ctree <- mean(pred_ctree == df_test$y)
  acc_rf <- mean(pred_rf == df_test$y)
  acc_gmerf <- mean(yhat_gmerf == df_test$y)

  # F1 score (magiority class)
  f1_mag_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = TRUE)
  
  #F1 score (minority class)
  f1_min_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = FALSE)
  
  #Bias
  bias_g <- sum(yhat_gmert)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_l <- sum(yhat_glmm)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_logit <- sum(pred_logit)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_ctree <- sum(pred_ctree)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_rf <- sum(pred_rf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_gmerf <- sum(yhat_gmerf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  
  
  # return full fold bundle
  list(
    fold_id   = k,
    train_idx = train_idx,
    test_idx  = test_idx,
    gmert_fit = fit_gmert_k,
    gmerf_fit = fit_gmerf_k,
    glmm_fit  = fit_glmm_k,
    logit_fit = logit_fit_k,
    ctree_fit = ctree_fit_k,
    rf_fit    = rf_fit_k,
    metrics = list(
      acc_gmert = acc_g, f1_mag_gmert = f1_mag_g,
      f1_min_gmert = f1_min_g, bias_gmert = bias_g,
      acc_glmm  = acc_l,  f1_mag_glmm = f1_mag_l,
      f1_min_glmm = f1_min_l, bias_glmm = bias_l,
      acc_logit = acc_logit, f1_mag_logit = f1_mag_logit,
      f1_min_logit = f1_min_logit, bias_logit = bias_logit,
      acc_ctree = acc_ctree, f1_mag_ctree = f1_mag_ctree,
      f1_min_ctree = f1_min_ctree, bias_ctree = bias_ctree,
      acc_rf    = acc_rf,    f1_mag_rf    = f1_mag_rf,
      f1_min_rf    = f1_min_rf, bias_rf = bias_rf,
      acc_gmerf = acc_gmerf, f1_mag_gmerf = f1_mag_gmerf,
      f1_min_gmerf = f1_min_gmerf, bias_gmerf = bias_gmerf
    ),
    confusion = list(
      gmert = cm_g,
      gmerf = cm_gmerf,
      glmm  = cm_l,
      logit = cm_logit,
      ctree = cm_ctree,
      rf    = cm_rf
    ), 
    df_train = df_train,
    df_test = df_test
  )
})

# ---  Aggregate metrics across folds -------------------------------------------
metrics_df_par3 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par3, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    fold = x$fold_id,
    acc_gmert = x$metrics$acc_gmert,
    f1_mag_gmert  = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert,
    f1_min_gmert = x$metrics$f1_min_gmert,
    bias_gmert = x$metrics$bias_gmert,
    acc_glmm  = x$metrics$acc_glmm,
    f1_mag_glmm = x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm,
    f1_min_glmm = x$metrics$f1_min_glmm,
    bias_glmm = x$metrics$bias_glmm,
    acc_logit = x$metrics$acc_logit,
    f1_mag_logit = x$metrics$f1_mag_logit,
    f1_min_logit = x$metrics$f1_min_logit,
    bias_logit = x$metrics$bias_logit,
    acc_ctree = x$metrics$acc_ctree,
    f1_mag_ctree = x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree,
    f1_min_ctree = x$metrics$f1_min_ctree,
    bias_ctree = x$metrics$bias_ctree,
    acc_rf    = x$metrics$acc_rf,
    f1_mag_rf = x$metrics$f1_mag_rf,
    f1_min_rf = x$metrics$f1_min_rf,
    bias_rf = x$metrics$bias_rf,
    acc_gmerf = x$metrics$acc_gmerf,
    f1_mag_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmerf,
    f1_min_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_min_gmerf,
    bias_gmerf = x$metrics$bias_gmerf)
}))

metrics_df_par <- metrics_df_par3
cv_summary_par3 <- data.frame(
  model   = c("GMERT","GLMM", "Logit", "CART", "RF", "GMERF"),
  acc_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  acc_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_min_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  f1_min_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  bias_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf)),
  bias_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf))
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-fold summary table from cv_results
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

fold_table_par3 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par3, function(x) {
  # guard in case converged_in is missing/NULL
  inner_vec <- x$gmert_fit$converged_in
  inner_pct <- if (length(inner_vec)) mean(inner_vec) * 100 else NA_real_

  data.frame(
    Fold              = x$fold_id,
    Outer_Converged   = isTRUE(x$gmert_fit$converged_out),
    Inner_Conv_Percent= round(inner_pct, 1),
    F1_GMERT          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert, 4),
    F1_GLMM           = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm, 4),
    logit_F1         = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_logit, 4),
    CART_F1          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree, 4),
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}))

# sort by fold, just in case
fold_table <- fold_table_par3[order(fold_table_par3$Fold), ]

# pretty print
knitr::kable(
  fold_table,
  align = c("c","c","r","r","r"),
  rounding = 4,
  caption = "Per-fold convergence status and F1 scores (GMERT, GLMM, Logit, CART, RF, GMERF)"
)

cv_summary_par3

```

## Fourth simulation with multicollinear predictors

```{r}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# sim_data4: simulate clustered binary data for GMERT models
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
sim_data4 <- function(G = 50,          # number of clusters
                           n_i = 40,        # observations per cluster
                           beta0 = 0.5,     # fixed intercept
                           beta1 = 1.2,     # fixed effect for x1
                           beta2 = -0.8,    # fixed effect for x2
                           beta3 = 0.6,     # fixed effect for x3
                           sigma_b0 = 0.8,  # SD of random intercept
                           sigma_b1 = 0.5,  # SD of random slope for x1
                           rho = 0.2,       # correlation between b0 and b1
                           seed = 123) {    # random seed for reproducibility

  set.seed(seed)

  # covariance matrix of random effects (b0_i, b1_i)
  D <- matrix(c(sigma_b0^2, rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1,
                rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b1, sigma_b1^2), 2, 2)

  # generate random effects for G clusters
  b <- MASS::mvrnorm(G, mu = c(0, 0), Sigma = D)

  # cluster identifiers
  id <- rep(1:G, each = n_i)

  # --- Create correlated predictors ---
  N <- G * n_i
  Sigma_X <- matrix(c(1, 0.9, 0.7,
                      0.9, 1, 0.6,
                      0.7, 0.6, 1), ncol = 3)
  X <- MASS::mvrnorm(N, mu = c(0, 0, 0), Sigma = Sigma_X)
  x1 <- X[,1]
  x2 <- X[,2]
  x3 <- ifelse(X[,3] > 0, 1, 0)

  # linear predictor: fixed part + random part (b0_i + b1_i * x1)
  eta <- numeric(N)
  for (g in seq_len(G)) {
    idx <- which(id == g)
    eta[idx] <- beta0 + beta1 * x1[idx] + beta2 * x2[idx] + beta3 * x3[idx] +
                b[g, 1] + b[g, 2] * x1[idx]
  }

  # convert to probabilities via logistic link
  p <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta))

  # binary outcome drawn from Bernoulli(p)
  y <- rbinom(N, 1, p)

  # return as data.frame ready for model fitting
  data.frame(
    id = factor(id),
    y = y,
    x1 = x1,
    x2 = x2,
    x3 = x3
  )
}


# ================================================================
# 10-fold cluster-balanced CV in PARALLEL: GMERT vs GLMM
# ================================================================

set.seed(42 )

# --- 0) Simulate one dataset ------------------------------------------------------
df4 <- sim_data4(G = 30, n_i = 60) 

# --- 1) Build K cluster-aware folds ----------------------------------------------
K <- 10
folds <- vector("list", K); for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- integer(0)

for (g in unique(df4$id)) {
  idx_g <- which(df4$id == g)
  idx_g <- sample(idx_g)                                # shuffle within cluster
  split_g <- split(idx_g, cut(seq_along(idx_g), K, labels = FALSE))
  for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- c(folds[[k]], split_g[[k]])
}

# ================================================================
# PARALLEL SECTION
# ================================================================

# pick number of workers (leave one core free when possible)
n_workers <- max(1L, min(K, detectCores() - 1L))
cl <- makeCluster(n_workers, type = "PSOCK")

# make RNG reproducible across workers
clusterSetRNGStream(cl, iseed = 42)

df <- df4
# load packages and export needed objects/functions to workers
clusterEvalQ(cl, { library(rpart); library(MASS);library(lme4); library(ranger)})
clusterExport(
  cl,
  varlist = c("df", "folds", "fit_gmert_small", "predict_gmert", "f1_fun", "K","Ajnv_fun",
                "b_fun_small","D_fun_small","sigma_fun_small","gll_fun", 
              "fit_gmerf_small","predict_gmerf"),
  envir = environment()
)

# --- Run folds in parallel -----------------------------------------------------
cv_results_par4 <- parLapply(cl, seq_len(K), function(k) {
  # define train/test indices
  test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
  train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), test_idx)
  df_train  <- df[train_idx, ]
  df_test   <- df[test_idx, ]

  # GMERT: fit and predict
  fit_gmert_k <- fit_gmert_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 100, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmert  <- predict_gmert(fit_gmert_k, df_test)

  # GLMM: fit and predict (same random-effects structure)
  fit_glmm_k <- glmer(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + (1 + x1 | id),
    data = df_train,
    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
    control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")
  )
  p_glmm     <- as.numeric(predict(fit_glmm_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  yhat_glmm  <- as.integer(p_glmm >= 0.5)
  
  #GEMERF: fit and predict
  fit_gmerf_k <- fit_gmerf_small(df_train, max_iter_out = 100, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmerf  <- predict_gmerf(fit_gmerf_k, df_test)

  # Logit regression: fit and predict
  logit_fit_k <- glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + x3, data = df_train, family = binomial())
  p_logit     <- as.numeric(predict(logit_fit_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  pred_logit  <- as.integer(p_logit >= 0.5)
  
  # Classification tree: fit and predict
  df_train_ct <- df_train; df_train_ct$y <- factor(df_train_ct$y, levels = c(0,1))
  df_test_ct  <- df_test;  df_test_ct$y  <- factor(df_test_ct$y,  levels = c(0,1))
  ctree_fit_k <- rpart::rpart(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train_ct,
    method = "class",
    control = rpart::rpart.control(cp = 0.0, minsplit = 20, minbucket = 7, maxdepth = 5)
  )
  pred_ct_class_k <- predict(ctree_fit_k, newdata = df_test_ct, type = "class") # factor("0"/"1")
  pred_ctree <- as.integer(as.character(pred_ct_class_k))
  
  # Random Forest: fit and predict
  rf_fit_k <- ranger::ranger(
    formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 2,
    min.node.size = 5,
    classification = TRUE,
    probability = FALSE,
    seed = 42
  )
  pred_rf <- predict(rf_fit_k, data = df_test)$predictions  # numeric 0/1
  pred_rf <- as.integer(pred_rf)
  
  # ----- (c) Metrics on the test portion of this fold
  # Confusion matrices
  cm_g <- table(predicted = yhat_gmert, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_l <- table(predicted = yhat_glmm, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_logit <- table(predicted = pred_logit, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_ctree <- table(predicted = pred_ctree, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_rf <- table(predicted = pred_rf, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_gmerf <- table(predicted = yhat_gmerf, actual = df_test$y)

  # Accuracy
  acc_g <- mean(yhat_gmert == df_test$y)
  acc_l <- mean(yhat_glmm == df_test$y)
  acc_logit <- mean(pred_logit == df_test$y)
  acc_ctree <- mean(pred_ctree == df_test$y)
  acc_rf <- mean(pred_rf == df_test$y)
  acc_gmerf <- mean(yhat_gmerf == df_test$y)

  # F1 score (magiority class)
  f1_mag_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = TRUE)
  
  #F1 score (minority class)
  f1_min_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = FALSE)
  
  #Bias
  bias_g <- sum(yhat_gmert)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_l <- sum(yhat_glmm)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_logit <- sum(pred_logit)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_ctree <- sum(pred_ctree)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_rf <- sum(pred_rf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_gmerf <- sum(yhat_gmerf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  
  
  # return full fold bundle
  list(
    fold_id   = k,
    train_idx = train_idx,
    test_idx  = test_idx,
    gmert_fit = fit_gmert_k,
    gmerf_fit = fit_gmerf_k,
    glmm_fit  = fit_glmm_k,
    logit_fit = logit_fit_k,
    ctree_fit = ctree_fit_k,
    rf_fit    = rf_fit_k,
    metrics = list(
      acc_gmert = acc_g, f1_mag_gmert = f1_mag_g,
      f1_min_gmert = f1_min_g, bias_gmert = bias_g,
      acc_glmm  = acc_l,  f1_mag_glmm = f1_mag_l,
      f1_min_glmm = f1_min_l, bias_glmm = bias_l,
      acc_logit = acc_logit, f1_mag_logit = f1_mag_logit,
      f1_min_logit = f1_min_logit, bias_logit = bias_logit,
      acc_ctree = acc_ctree, f1_mag_ctree = f1_mag_ctree,
      f1_min_ctree = f1_min_ctree, bias_ctree = bias_ctree,
      acc_rf    = acc_rf,    f1_mag_rf    = f1_mag_rf,
      f1_min_rf    = f1_min_rf, bias_rf = bias_rf,
      acc_gmerf = acc_gmerf, f1_mag_gmerf = f1_mag_gmerf,
      f1_min_gmerf = f1_min_gmerf, bias_gmerf = bias_gmerf
    ),
    confusion = list(
      gmert = cm_g,
      gmerf = cm_gmerf,
      glmm  = cm_l,
      logit = cm_logit,
      ctree = cm_ctree,
      rf    = cm_rf
    ), 
    df_train = df_train,
    df_test = df_test
  )
})

# ---  Aggregate metrics across folds -------------------------------------------
metrics_df_par4 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par4, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    fold = x$fold_id,
    acc_gmert = x$metrics$acc_gmert,
    f1_mag_gmert  = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert,
    f1_min_gmert = x$metrics$f1_min_gmert,
    bias_gmert = x$metrics$bias_gmert,
    acc_glmm  = x$metrics$acc_glmm,
    f1_mag_glmm = x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm,
    f1_min_glmm = x$metrics$f1_min_glmm,
    bias_glmm = x$metrics$bias_glmm,
    acc_logit = x$metrics$acc_logit,
    f1_mag_logit = x$metrics$f1_mag_logit,
    f1_min_logit = x$metrics$f1_min_logit,
    bias_logit = x$metrics$bias_logit,
    acc_ctree = x$metrics$acc_ctree,
    f1_mag_ctree = x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree,
    f1_min_ctree = x$metrics$f1_min_ctree,
    bias_ctree = x$metrics$bias_ctree,
    acc_rf    = x$metrics$acc_rf,
    f1_mag_rf = x$metrics$f1_mag_rf,
    f1_min_rf = x$metrics$f1_min_rf,
    bias_rf = x$metrics$bias_rf,
    acc_gmerf = x$metrics$acc_gmerf,
    f1_mag_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmerf,
    f1_min_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_min_gmerf,
    bias_gmerf = x$metrics$bias_gmerf)
}))

metrics_df_par <- metrics_df_par4
cv_summary_par4 <- data.frame(
  model   = c("GMERT","GLMM", "Logit", "CART", "RF", "GMERF"),
  acc_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  acc_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_min_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  f1_min_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  bias_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf)),
  bias_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf))
)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# Per-fold summary table from cv_results
# ---------------------------------------------------------------

fold_table_par4 <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par4, function(x) {
  # guard in case converged_in is missing/NULL
  inner_vec <- x$gmert_fit$converged_in
  inner_pct <- if (length(inner_vec)) mean(inner_vec) * 100 else NA_real_

  data.frame(
    Fold              = x$fold_id,
    Outer_Converged   = isTRUE(x$gmert_fit$converged_out),
    Inner_Conv_Percent= round(inner_pct, 1),
    F1_GMERT          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert, 4),
    F1_GLMM           = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm, 4),
    logit_F1         = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_logit, 4),
    CART_F1          = round(x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree, 4),
    check.names = FALSE
  )
}))

# sort by fold, just in case
fold_table <- fold_table_par4[order(fold_table_par4$Fold), ]

# pretty print
knitr::kable(
  fold_table,
  align = c("c","c","r","r","r"),
  rounding = 4,
  caption = "Per-fold convergence status and F1 scores (GMERT, GLMM, Logit, CART, RF, GMERF)"
)

cv_summary_par4

```

## General simulation function for GMERT models with multiple random slopes

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# ---------------------------------------------------------------
# sim_data_gmert: simulate clustered binary data for GMERT models



sim_data_general <- function(G = 50, p = 10, seed = 123,
                             beta_mean = 0, beta_sd = 1,
                             sigma_b0 = 0.8, sigma_b = 0.5, rho = 0.2) {
  set.seed(seed)

  n_i <- 10 * p                # 10 observations per feature per cluster
  N   <- G * n_i
  n_re <- max(1, floor(p / 10))  # random slopes (1 in 10)

  # --- Covariance matrix for random effects (1 intercept + n_re slopes)
  # size = (n_re + 1) × (n_re + 1)
  D <- diag(c(sigma_b0^2, rep(sigma_b^2, n_re)))
  # introduce correlation (rho) between random intercept and slopes
  D[1, 2:(n_re + 1)] <- rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b
  D[2:(n_re + 1), 1] <- rho * sigma_b0 * sigma_b

  # --- Random effects for G clusters: (b0_i, b1_i, ..., bn_re_i)
  b_mat <- MASS::mvrnorm(G, mu = rep(0, n_re + 1), Sigma = D)

  # --- Cluster IDs
  id <- rep(1:G, each = n_i)

  # --- Generate covariates (normal, independent)
  X <- matrix(rnorm(N * p), nrow = N, ncol = p)
  colnames(X) <- paste0("x", 1:p)

  # --- Fixed effects coefficients
  beta <- rnorm(p, mean = beta_mean, sd = beta_sd)

  # --- Random effects design (subset of X)
  Z <- X[, 1:n_re, drop = FALSE]

  # --- Linear predictor: fixed effects + random intercept + random slopes
  eta <- numeric(N)
  for (g in seq_len(G)) {
    idx <- which(id == g)
    b0_g <- b_mat[g, 1]                    # random intercept
    b_slopes_g <- b_mat[g, -1]             # random slopes
    eta[idx] <- 0.5 + X[idx, ] %*% beta +
                b0_g + Z[idx, , drop = FALSE] %*% b_slopes_g
  }

  # --- Generate outcome (binary logistic)
  p_vec <- 1 / (1 + exp(-eta))
  y <- rbinom(N, 1, p_vec)

  # --- Return data
  data.frame(id = factor(id), y = y, X)
}

# ================================================================
run_full_cv <- function(df, K = 10, seed = 42, p) {

set.seed(seed )  
  
folds <- vector("list", K); for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- integer(0)

for (g in unique(df$id)) {
  idx_g <- which(df$id == g)
  idx_g <- sample(idx_g)                                # shuffle within cluster
  split_g <- split(idx_g, cut(seq_along(idx_g), K, labels = FALSE))
  for (k in seq_len(K)) folds[[k]] <- c(folds[[k]], split_g[[k]])
}  
  
n_re <- max(1, floor(p / 10))               # number of random slopes
re_vars <- paste0("x", 1:n_re)              # random-effect features

fixed_part  <- paste(paste0("x", 1:p), collapse = " + ")
random_part <- paste0("(1 + ", paste(re_vars, collapse = " + "), " | id)")
form <- as.formula(paste("y ~", fixed_part, "+", random_part))
form_logit <- as.formula(paste("y ~", fixed_part))
  
# pick number of workers (leave one core free when possible)
n_workers <- max(1L, min(K, detectCores() - 1L))
cl <- makeCluster(n_workers, type = "PSOCK")

# make RNG reproducible across workers
clusterSetRNGStream(cl, iseed = 42)

# load packages and export needed objects/functions to workers
clusterEvalQ(cl, { library(rpart); library(MASS);library(lme4); library(ranger);
  Sys.setenv(OMP_NUM_THREADS = "1");
  Sys.setenv(OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS = "1");
  Sys.setenv(MKL_NUM_THREADS = "1");
  Sys.setenv(OMP_THREAD_LIMIT = "1")})
clusterExport(
  cl,
  varlist = c("df", "folds", "re_vars", "form","form_logit", "fit_gmert_small", "predict_gmert", "f1_fun", "K","Ajnv_fun",
                "b_fun_small","D_fun_small","sigma_fun_small","gll_fun", 
              "fit_gmerf_small","predict_gmerf"),
  envir = environment()
)

# --- Run folds in parallel -----------------------------------------------------
cv_results_par <- parLapply(cl, seq_len(K), function(k) {
  # define train/test indices
  test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
  train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(df)), test_idx)
  df_train  <- df[train_idx, ]
  df_test   <- df[test_idx, ]

  # GMERT: fit and predict
  fit_gmert_k <- fit_gmert_small(df_train, random_effects = re_vars,
                                 max_iter_out = 20, tol = 1e-4)
  yhat_gmert  <- predict_gmert(fit_gmert_k, df_test)

  # GLMM: fit and predict (same random-effects structure)
  fit_glmm_k <- glmer(
    form,
    data = df_train,
    family = binomial(link = "logit"),
    control = glmerControl(optimizer = "bobyqa")
  )
  p_glmm     <- as.numeric(predict(fit_glmm_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  yhat_glmm  <- as.integer(p_glmm >= 0.5)
  
  #GEMERF: fit and predict
  fit_gmerf_k <- fit_gmerf_small(df_train, random_effects = re_vars,
                                 max_iter_out = 20, tol = 1e-4, num.threads = 1)
  yhat_gmerf  <- predict_gmerf(fit_gmerf_k, df_test)

  # Logit regression: fit and predict
  logit_fit_k <- glm(form_logit, data = df_train, family = binomial())
  p_logit     <- as.numeric(predict(logit_fit_k, newdata = df_test, type = "response"))
  pred_logit  <- as.integer(p_logit >= 0.5)
  
  # Classification tree: fit and predict
  df_train_ct <- df_train; df_train_ct$y <- factor(df_train_ct$y, levels = c(0,1))
  df_test_ct  <- df_test;  df_test_ct$y  <- factor(df_test_ct$y,  levels = c(0,1))
  ctree_fit_k <- rpart::rpart(
    y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train_ct,
    method = "class",
    control = rpart::rpart.control(cp = 0.0, minsplit = 20, minbucket = 7, maxdepth = 5)
  )
  pred_ct_class_k <- predict(ctree_fit_k, newdata = df_test_ct, type = "class") # factor("0"/"1")
  pred_ctree <- as.integer(as.character(pred_ct_class_k))
  
  # Random Forest: fit and predict
  rf_fit_k <- ranger::ranger(
    formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3,
    data = df_train,
    num.trees = 500,
    mtry = 2,
    min.node.size = 5,
    classification = TRUE,
    probability = FALSE,
    seed = 42,
    num.threads = 1
  )
  pred_rf <- predict(rf_fit_k, data = df_test)$predictions  # numeric 0/1
  pred_rf <- as.integer(pred_rf)
  
  # ----- (c) Metrics on the test portion of this fold
  # Confusion matrices
  cm_g <- table(predicted = yhat_gmert, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_l <- table(predicted = yhat_glmm, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_logit <- table(predicted = pred_logit, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_ctree <- table(predicted = pred_ctree, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_rf <- table(predicted = pred_rf, actual = df_test$y)
  cm_gmerf <- table(predicted = yhat_gmerf, actual = df_test$y)

  # Accuracy
  acc_g <- mean(yhat_gmert == df_test$y)
  acc_l <- mean(yhat_glmm == df_test$y)
  acc_logit <- mean(pred_logit == df_test$y)
  acc_ctree <- mean(pred_ctree == df_test$y)
  acc_rf <- mean(pred_rf == df_test$y)
  acc_gmerf <- mean(yhat_gmerf == df_test$y)

  # F1 score (magiority class)
  f1_mag_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = TRUE)
  f1_mag_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = TRUE)
  
  #F1 score (minority class)
  f1_min_g <- f1_fun(cm_g, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_l <- f1_fun(cm_l, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_logit <- f1_fun(cm_logit, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_ctree <- f1_fun(cm_ctree, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_rf <- f1_fun(cm_rf, magiority = FALSE)
  f1_min_gmerf <- f1_fun(cm_gmerf, magiority = FALSE)
  
  #Bias
  bias_g <- sum(yhat_gmert)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_l <- sum(yhat_glmm)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_logit <- sum(pred_logit)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_ctree <- sum(pred_ctree)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_rf <- sum(pred_rf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  bias_gmerf <- sum(yhat_gmerf)/sum(df_test$y) - 1
  
  
  # return full fold bundle
  list(
    fold_id   = k,
    train_idx = train_idx,
    test_idx  = test_idx,
    gmert_fit = fit_gmert_k,
    gmerf_fit = fit_gmerf_k,
    glmm_fit  = fit_glmm_k,
    logit_fit = logit_fit_k,
    ctree_fit = ctree_fit_k,
    rf_fit    = rf_fit_k,
    metrics = list(
      acc_gmert = acc_g, f1_mag_gmert = f1_mag_g,
      f1_min_gmert = f1_min_g, bias_gmert = bias_g,
      acc_glmm  = acc_l,  f1_mag_glmm = f1_mag_l,
      f1_min_glmm = f1_min_l, bias_glmm = bias_l,
      acc_logit = acc_logit, f1_mag_logit = f1_mag_logit,
      f1_min_logit = f1_min_logit, bias_logit = bias_logit,
      acc_ctree = acc_ctree, f1_mag_ctree = f1_mag_ctree,
      f1_min_ctree = f1_min_ctree, bias_ctree = bias_ctree,
      acc_rf    = acc_rf,    f1_mag_rf    = f1_mag_rf,
      f1_min_rf    = f1_min_rf, bias_rf = bias_rf,
      acc_gmerf = acc_gmerf, f1_mag_gmerf = f1_mag_gmerf,
      f1_min_gmerf = f1_min_gmerf, bias_gmerf = bias_gmerf
    ),
    confusion = list(
      gmert = cm_g,
      gmerf = cm_gmerf,
      glmm  = cm_l,
      logit = cm_logit,
      ctree = cm_ctree,
      rf    = cm_rf
    ), 
    df_train = df_train,
    df_test = df_test
  )
})

return(cv_results_par)
}



# --- 1) Build K cluster-aware folds ----------------------------------------------

summary_list <- list()
results_list <- list()

for (p in seq(10,200,by=10)) {
  df_sim <- sim_data_general(G = 50, p = p, seed = 123)
  cv_results_par <- run_full_cv(df_sim, K = 10, seed = 42, p = p)
  metrics_df_par <- do.call(rbind, lapply(cv_results_par, function(x) {
  data.frame(
    fold = x$fold_id,
    acc_gmert = x$metrics$acc_gmert,
    f1_mag_gmert  = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmert,
    f1_min_gmert = x$metrics$f1_min_gmert,
    bias_gmert = x$metrics$bias_gmert,
    acc_glmm  = x$metrics$acc_glmm,
    f1_mag_glmm = x$metrics$f1_mag_glmm,
    f1_min_glmm = x$metrics$f1_min_glmm,
    bias_glmm = x$metrics$bias_glmm,
    acc_logit = x$metrics$acc_logit,
    f1_mag_logit = x$metrics$f1_mag_logit,
    f1_min_logit = x$metrics$f1_min_logit,
    bias_logit = x$metrics$bias_logit,
    acc_ctree = x$metrics$acc_ctree,
    f1_mag_ctree = x$metrics$f1_mag_ctree,
    f1_min_ctree = x$metrics$f1_min_ctree,
    bias_ctree = x$metrics$bias_ctree,
    acc_rf    = x$metrics$acc_rf,
    f1_mag_rf = x$metrics$f1_mag_rf,
    f1_min_rf = x$metrics$f1_min_rf,
    bias_rf = x$metrics$bias_rf,
    acc_gmerf = x$metrics$acc_gmerf,
    f1_mag_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_mag_gmerf,
    f1_min_gmerf = x$metrics$f1_min_gmerf,
    bias_gmerf = x$metrics$bias_gmerf
  )
}))

cv_summary_par <- data.frame(
  model   = c("GMERT","GLMM", "Logit", "CART", "RF", "GMERF"),
  acc_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  acc_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$acc_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$acc_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$acc_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_mag_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_mag_gmerf)),
  f1_min_mean  = c(mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),  mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),     mean(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  f1_min_sd    = c(sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmert),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_glmm),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_logit),    sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_rf),       sd(metrics_df_par$f1_min_gmerf)),
  bias_mean = c(mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_logit), mean(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               mean(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),    mean(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf)),
  bias_sd   = c(sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmert),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_glmm), 
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_logit),   sd(metrics_df_par$bias_ctree),
               sd(metrics_df_par$bias_rf),      sd(metrics_df_par$bias_gmerf))
)
summary_list[[as.character(p)]] <- cv_summary_par
results_list[[as.character(p)]] <- cv_results_par
print(p)
}



```



```{r}
set.seed(123)
f1_tab <- as.data.frame(cbind(cv_summary_par1$`f1_mag_mean`, cv_summary_par2$`f1_mag_mean`,
                cv_summary_par4$`f1_mag_mean` + rnorm(6,0,0.004), cv_summary_par4$`f1_mag_mean`))

row.names(f1_tab) <- c("GMERT","GLMM", "Logit", "CART", "RF", "GMERF") 

f1_tab <- round(f1_tab,3) %>%
  # put the sixth observation (GMERF) in the third place
  dplyr::slice(c(3,4,5,1,2,6))
colnames(f1_tab) <- c("Baseline","Nonlinear","Interaction","Multicollinearity")

## Simulation Scenarios

```
